headerDisplay: Homebridge platform for DMX controllers. Currently supports the Nicolaudie Stick-DE3; the controller abstraction is structured so additional DMX controllers can be added later without rewriting your patch.
footerDisplay: For larger setups, point **yamlPath** at an external YAML file containing the controllers + profiles + patch. The YAML replaces the inline JSON below entirely.

yamlPath.title: YAML config path (optional)
yamlPath.description: Absolute or relative path to a YAML file containing the full config. When set, the YAML replaces the JSON fields below.

controllers.title: DMX Controllers
controllers.description: One entry per physical controller. Patch entries below reference these by id.

id.title: Controller id
id.description: kebab-case identifier; referenced from patch entries.

ip.title: IP address
ip.description: Static IP of the controller on its DMX VLAN (e.g. 192.168.96.2). Discovery is not supported.

name.title: Profile name
name.description: Used as the 'type' in patch entries below.

channel_order.title: Channel order
channel_order.description: Names in DMX-slot order. Append ' (Fine)' for a 16-bit companion, e.g. 'Intensity (Fine)'. CCT channels include a K range: 'ColorTemp 1650-8000'.

id.title: Fixture id
id.description: kebab-case identifier; the fixture's stable handle.

type.title: Profile
type.description: Must match a Profile name above.

controller.title: Controller
controller.description: Controller id this fixture is wired to. Optional when only one controller is configured.
